- resists care - behavioral symptom frequency. 0 = Behavior not exhibited in last 30 days, 1 = Behavior of this type occurred 1 to 3 days in last 7 days, 2 = Behavior of this type occurred 4 to 6 days, but less than daily, 3 = Behavior of this type occurred daily, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
185 E4EB E4EB_RESIST_ALT (E4EB) Resists Care Alterability CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns: behavioral symptoms - resists care - behavioral symptom alterability. 0 = Behavior not present OR behavior easily
